latin: Baba Yaga eum vocant. non est sicarius quem ad aliquem occidendum mittis — est is quem mittis ad sicarium occidendum. unus homo, una voluntas.

questions.prompt: What makes him special among assassins?
questions.target: He is the one you send to kill other assassins
choices: He is the one you send to kill other assassins

translation: They call him Baba Yaga. He is not the assassin you send to kill someone — he is the one you send to kill the assassin. One man, one will.
